title: Bánh Tôm Chiên

groups.heading: Bột · Batter
items: ½ teaspoon turmeric powder (bột nghệ) — for golden color
2 cups sparkling water or beer (nước lọc có ga hoặc bia)

groups.heading: Tôm · Shrimp
items: 1 lb medium shrimp, peeled and deveined (leave tails on for presentation)

groups.heading: Để ăn kèm · To Serve
items: Fresh herbs — mint, perilla (tía tô), cilantro

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Make the batter: whisk together flour, beaten eggs, salt, and turmeric until smooth. Slowly pour in the sparkling water or beer, stirring gently.
Let the batter rest for 10 minutes.
Heat oil in a deep pot or wok to 350°F. You need enough oil to submerge the shrimp.
Dip each shrimp into the batter, letting the excess drip off. Carefully lower into the hot oil. Fry a few at a time.
Fry for 3–4 minutes, turning once, until golden and crispy. Drain on a wire rack.
Serve immediately with lettuce, fresh herbs, pickled vegetables, and nước chấm.

scan_label: Công thức gốc · Original handwritten recipe
